page_metadata.biotools__summary: MedicDeepLabv3plus is a convolutional neural network based on DeepLabv3+ implemented in Python and Pytorch to extract the brain mask and the contralateral hemisphere of rodent MRI brain scans with lesions.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: MedicDeepLabv3plus is a convolutional neural network based on DeepLabv3+ implemented in Python and Pytorch to extract the brain mask and the contralateral hemisphere of rodent MRI brain scans with lesions.
